title: Who Killed Aunt Maggie?
writer: Stuart Palmer, Frank Gill Jr., Hal Fimberg
actors: John Hubbard, Wendy Barrie, Edgar Kennedy
plot: Radio mystery script writer Sally Ambler is about to be married, then gets into a quarrel with her intended Kirk Pierce after he finds the story she wrote too contrived. The wedding is put off when a telegram from her Aunt Maggie ...
